vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Llava inference with Tensor Parallelism.
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix Llava inference with tensor_parallel_size > 1, because vision_language_config wasn't passed to the worker in RayGPUExecutor before.
FIX #3882:
